notes:
Critical DSV4 fixes — clean output across all 4 user-facing API paths.

What 1.3.94 was producing: gibberish (BatchedEngine path) or training-data leakage (SimpleEngine chat-mode: '[URL REMOVED BY BROTS]', Chinese annotation 'NOT解答USER问题而是INSTRUCTAI', spam URLs, emoji shortcode strings, self-referential meta-narrative).

Two stacked fixes:

1. AUTO-ROUTE DSV4 TO SIMPLEENGINE (commit 14defcef). mlx_lm BatchGenerator's continuous-batching pipeline is incompatible with DSV4's custom 4D mHC layout (Model.__call__ tiles to (B, T, hc_mult, hidden) for the hyper-connection mechanism). Fix: when family_name=='deepseek_v4', force args.continuous_batching=False. SimpleEngine produces correct logits.

2. FORCE enable_thinking=True FOR DSV4 (commit 2340c182). The DSV4-Flash-JANGTQ bundle is fundamentally broken in chat-mode (when enable_thinking=False and template ends with </think>). Model regurgitates training-data artifacts. With enable_thinking=True, model produces clean coherent output every time. Force-flip applied at all 3 server.py sites: /v1/chat/completions, /api/chat (Ollama), /v1/responses. Each logs an INFO line explaining the override.

Verified across all 5 API surfaces: /v1/chat/completions, /v1/responses, /api/chat, /v1/messages (Anthropic), and the panel chat UI.

Also ships:
- jjang-ai/vmlx#114 cross-shard pre-fix wired at all 4 sites (not just 2). Catches mixed-precision JANG VLM modules whose .weight + .scales straddle shard boundaries in _repack_jang_to_mlx tmp_dir + VLM sanitize_weights second-pass.

Update channels: GH release v1.3.96, latest.json 1.3.96, PyPI vmlx 1.3.96, engine __version__ 1.3.96, panel package.json 1.3.96.
